title: Insights
description: Compare the current period with the preceding period of the same length.

freshness.delay: Data can be delayed by up to 10 minutes.

loginRequired.title: Login required
loginRequired.description: Sign in to view your personal insights.

summary.title: Key changes
summary.description: Notable changes compared with the previous period.
summary.empty: No changes exceeded the highlight thresholds.

kpi.noPrevious: No previous-period data is available for comparison.

chart.title: Current and previous trends
chart.description: Compare matching elapsed positions across both periods.
chart.accessibleLabel: Current and previous period usage comparison chart
chart.accessibleDescription: Two lines compare current and previous period usage at each elapsed position.

composition.title: Composition changes
composition.description: Items with the largest share changes are shown first.
composition.label: Composition dimension

empty.title: No usage data
empty.description: No cost, session, or token usage was found for the selected period and provider.

utilization.title: AI utilization index
utilization.description: Compares your recent workflow with your own usual pattern. Usage volume does not affect the score.
utilization.summaryDescription: 50 represents your usual level. Higher or lower does not mean better or worse work.

summary.above: This is above your usual workflow
summary.usual: This is within your usual range
summary.below: This is below your usual workflow
summary.unavailable: There is not enough data to compare yet

utilization.unavailable: There is not enough data to calculate the index
utilization.delay: Data can be delayed by up to 10 minutes.

signals.title: Signals used in the index
signals.description: The overall index is available only when both signals can be calculated.

dimensionDescriptions.context_continuity: The share of input context reused from cache.
dimensionDescriptions.execution_stability: The success rate among MCP and skill calls with a known outcome.

recovery.title: Recovery rate after failure
recovery.description: Results of retries within 30 minutes for the same tool and session. This is not counted again in the overall index.
recovery.noAttempts: There were no post-failure retries with a known outcome in the current period.

trend.title: 12-week trend
trend.description: Shows {count} weeks that can be calculated with the same methodology.
trend.aria: AI utilization index trend over 12 weeks. {count} weeks can be calculated

reasons.insufficient_current_days: The current period has fewer than 3 active days.
reasons.insufficient_current_sessions: The current period has fewer than 5 sessions.
reasons.insufficient_baseline_days: The baseline period has fewer than 7 active days.
reasons.unsupported_cache_signal: The current collector does not report cache signals.
reasons.insufficient_context_days: There are not enough daily signals for context continuity.
reasons.insufficient_known_tool_calls: There are fewer than 10 tool calls with a known outcome.
reasons.insufficient_tool_days: There are not enough daily signals to compare tool execution success.
reasons.insufficient_valid_dimensions: Fewer than 2 dimensions can be calculated.
reasons.suppressed_small_cohort: The organization minimum cohort is not met.
reasons.insufficient_eligible_users: Too few users meet the confidence threshold.
reasons.mixed_methodology_versions: Results from different methodology versions are not aggregated.

usage.new: Usage started after no sessions in the previous period.

cost.increase: Cost increased by {delta}% from the previous period.
cost.decrease: Cost decreased by {delta}% from the previous period.

sessions.increase: Sessions increased by {delta}% from the previous period.
sessions.decrease: Sessions decreased by {delta}% from the previous period.

tokens.increase: Token usage increased by {delta}% from the previous period.
tokens.decrease: Token usage decreased by {delta}% from the previous period.

efficiency.increase: Cost per session increased by {delta}% from the previous period.
efficiency.decrease: Cost per session decreased by {delta}% from the previous period.

composition.increase: The share of {name} in {dimension} increased by {delta} percentage points.
composition.decrease: The share of {name} in {dimension} decreased by {delta} percentage points.
